user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of employee feedback and grievances with Raised by, Type, Title, Submitted date, Status, and Task columns, so that I can review all submissions in one place
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Feedback / Grievance screen; When the list loads; Then each entry shows Raised by, Type, Title, Submitted date, Status, and Task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search feedback and grievance records, so that I can quickly find specific submissions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Feedback / Grievance screen; When I enter criteria and click Search; Then only matching records are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my criteria and start a new query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter feedback by Status such as All, Submitted, Feedback received, Closed, and Reopened, so that I can focus on submissions at a particular stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Feedback / Grievance screen; When I select a Status value; Then only records with that status are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter by Active employees or Inactive employees and by Raised by, so that I can narrow results to the relevant submitters
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Feedback / Grievance screen; When I choose Active or Inactive employees and a Raised by value; Then the list reflects the selected filters

user_story: As an employee, I want to submit feedback or grievance anonymously, so that I can raise concerns without revealing my identity
acceptance_criteria: Given I raise a feedback or grievance anonymously; When it is submitted; Then it appears with Raised by shown as Anonymous

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see feedback that requires action by me and refresh the list, so that I can stay current on pending items
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Feedback / Grievance screen; When I view Action required by me and click Refresh; Then the latest items requiring my action are displayed
